essence: Designs and integrates perception, planning, and control systems for autonomous platforms.

identity.title: Autonomous Systems Engineer
identity.summary: Builds end‑to‑end autonomy stacks, integrating sensors, perception models, planners, and control algorithms for reliable operation.

salary.notes: Senior engineers with multi‑domain experience (AVs, drones, robotics) are highly sought after.

qualifications: Degree in robotics, controls, computer science, or related field
Experience with perception, planning, and control algorithms
Proficiency in C++/Python and ROS or similar frameworks
Strong systems engineering and integration skills

lifestyle.description: Cross‑disciplinary engineering role with lab prototyping, field trials, and close collaboration with software and hardware teams.

habits: Diagnoses system failures and iterates designs
